description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a smooth, slightly matte finish, extending into a long, straight fore-end. The receiver and barrel assembly are rendered in a dark metallic color, with visible details such as the bolt handle, trigger guard, and iron sights. The rifle has a fixed stock and a standard-length barrel, with metal bands securing the barrel to the wooden fore-end. The magazine is internal, as indicated by the lack of a protruding detachable box. The front sight is a simple post, while the rear sight is a notch, both integrated into the barrel and receiver. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century bolt-action military rifles, with a utilitarian and robust appearance.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and integrated iron sights. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a fixed stock and internal magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the wooden stock, the trigger guard, bolt handle, and the iron sights along the barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the slim end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the bolt handle slightly visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the barrel bands securing the fore-end.
